title: lycopodium pumilum var. pygmaeum
intro: Lycopodium pumilum var. pygmaeum, also known as Dwarf club moss or Lycopodium moss, is a type of small, evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Lycopodiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, burns, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lycopodium pumilum var. pygmaeum are numerous, including its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and provide relief from symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
